name: @vexa/gmeet-capture
description: The gmeet capture layer (browser): Google Meet per-channel audio + the glow name bound at the source → capture.v1. Hosted by the extension (live) and the bot (container).

scripts.test: tsx src/gmeet-capture.test.ts && tsx src/gmeet-speakers.test.ts && tsx src/gmeet-channel-binder.test.ts
